combat_stats.19 March2015(Update|poll): The accurate attack style of the Godswords has been adjusted to use slash rather than crush. As the slash attack bonus on Godswords has always been higher than the crush bonus, having the accurate attack style of the weapons use slash rather than crush means that the accurate attack style takes advantage of the best offensive bonus of the weapon.
combat_stats.7 November2013(Update|poll): The Accurate combat mode of godswords has been changed from 'Stab' to 'Crush', since godswords have no stab-attack bonusGodswords will now pop up a confirmation box when you try to dismantle them

sources: Most weapons with an attack style that's considered Slash can be used to cut a banana into Sliced banana . This can result in some humorous or nonsensical combinations. Examples include cutting bananas with an abyssal whip , some beach boxing gloves or a butterfly net . This interaction is unique to bananas, they cannot be used to slice other fruits or food items.
Examples include cutting bananas with an abyssal whip , some beach boxing gloves or a butterfly net .
This interaction is unique to bananas, they cannot be used to slice other fruits or food items.

A one-time medium clue scroll can be rarely obtained (1/256 chance [ 1 ] ) from feeding a monkey bananas. When this happens, a message appears in the player's chatbox saying "The monkey chews on the banana and spits out a clue!".

name: Cabbage
examine: Yuck I don't like cabbage.

wiki.examine: Yuck I don't like cabbage.
sources: When you try to exchange cabbages into noted cabbages at the Falador farming patches, the tool leprechaun complains about cabbages and says to take them away.
It is possible to obtain three cabbages as a master clue scroll reward. [ 1 ]

If a player receives 0 points in the Theatre of Blood , they will only receive a cabbage as a reward from the chest in Verzik Vitur 's treasure vault, along with a message that reads, We are most displeased with your performance. Are you even trying?
When you pick all of the cabbages in the north Aldarin patch, a cabbage farmer spawns; he is devastated that you've taken all his cabbages on harvest day.

wiki.examine: Some hard dry clay.
sources: Clay is the fastest respawning rock as it respawns in just two game ticks .

Training Mining with clay from level 1 to 99 would require a total of 2,606,887 pieces of clay be mined, which would turn a profit of 192,909,638 if sold at the current price of 74 coins each. It takes about 1 minute to mine 28 clay using a Rune pickaxe and about 1 minute to bank and return, so this means about 840 clay per hour for a total of 3,104 hours of work.

name: Cooking apple
examine: Keeps the doctor away.

wiki.examine: Keeps the doctor away.
sources: The apple's examine of "Keeps the doctor away" is the latter half of the proverb, "An apple a day keeps the doctor away." The barrel of apples around Lunar Isle and the Lady Zay completes the proverb with its examine text: "An apple a day..."
There are a lot of apple trees around the The Golden Field tavern in Hosidius , however the player cannot pick any apples from these.
The apples' bright green colour suggests that they are based on Granny Smith apples. Granny Smiths are commonly used as a cooking apple, and they may also be used to brew alcoholic apple cider.

name: Cup of tea
examine: A nice cup of tea.

wiki.examine: A nice cup of tea.
sources: This is the only type of tea that cannot be used with a bucket of milk to make a milky version.
Nettle tea and POH tea have the empty option, but this standard tea does not.

In RuneScape Classic , players were able to telegrab the display tea unlike in RuneScape 2 ; it was tradeable. If the player dropped the display tea, they could not pick it up unless they used Telekinetic Grab . It was also used in scams occasionally.
Ghasts cannot rot tea. This may be because a cup of tea is classed as a potion.
Drinking a cup of tea does incur a combat delay similar to most healing items.
Players can give a cup of tea to Elsie on the second floor of the Varrock church. In exchange she will tell the player a story.
A variant cup of tea can be found in Yanille and is involved in Zogre Flesh Eaters .

name: Dragon scimitar
examine: A vicious, curved sword.

wiki.examine: A vicious, curved sword.
sources: The dragon scimitar was not actually released until almost four months after the release of the Monkey Madness I quest on 29 March 2005 .

If the player asked Zeke to sell them a dragon scimitar, he would say, "Seriously, you'll be a monkey's uncle before you'll ever hold a dragon scimitar." The joke is that in Monkey Madness I, the player plays the role of a monkey's uncle to complete a certain part of the quest, and completing the quest is required to wield the dragon scimitar.
The Dragon scimitar originally had a special attack that stopped your opponent from moving for a short period of time but Jagex later changed it in an update to stop protection prayers instead.

sources: When attempting to cut a dragonstone, the option to stop cutting the dragonstone into tips is "No! Don't cut my lovely dragonstone!" If the dragonstone is left intact, the player will receive a chatbox message: You carefully take the chisel away from the expensive dragonstone.
If the dragonstone is left intact, the player will receive a chatbox message: You carefully take the chisel away from the expensive dragonstone.
Dragonstone was used as one of the tiers of post count badges on the official Runescape Forums . Players had to have made 500,000 posts to be given the dragonstone badge.

name: Fishing bait
examine: For use with a fishing rod.

wiki.examine: For use with a fishing rod.
sources: During the quest Recipe for Disaster , fishing bait is revealed to be maggots. This explains why decaying zombies and many other undead creatures drop fishing bait. The Catherby Bait Delivery task, on the other hand, has Gerrant claiming they're "literally just worms".
The Catherby Bait Delivery task, on the other hand, has Gerrant claiming they're "literally just worms".

The buy limit of fishing bait (8,000) means that a player cannot buy enough (10,000) all at once off the Grand Exchange to build a chum spreader without waiting for the buy limit to refresh in 4 hours.

name: Ghrazi rapier
examine: A razor sharp rapier, smeared with vampyric blood.

wiki.examine: A razor sharp rapier, smeared with vampyric blood.
sources: The name of this weapon refers to House Ghrazi , a vampyre house known for their aggression and ferocity in battle.
Despite its examine text stating the rapier has been smeared in blood, there is no visible blood on the rapier when equipped or dropped.
Three Ghrazi rapiers, along with an uncharged scythe of vitur, can be seen leaning against a wall in Death's Office .
The weapon’s model, level requirements, examine text, and stats closely resemble those of the chaotic rapier , first introduced on 12 April 2010 in RuneScape 2 .

name: Gnomeball
examine: A ball used in Gnomeball.

wiki.examine: A ball used in Gnomeball.
sources: Attempting to bank a gnomeball with an Imp-in-a-box will result in a message box appearing with the imp in the box saying: "I'm not touching a gnomeball; that's a vicious game! I might die!"
The gnomeball has been used by many players to determine whether or not an account is botting , as the sudden appearance of a foreign object in their inventory may halt their programming.
If a gnomeball is dropped in the Gnome Ball minigame, the gnomeball will not appear on the ground and instead results in the message The ball magically returns to the ref as you put it down. .
Attempting to go Underwater or to the Coral Nurseries with a gnomeball equipped displays the chatbox message "The gnomeball you are carrying feels very buoyant. Perhaps you should leave it behind."

Attempting to go diving with the gnomeball in the inventory will result in Murphy asking if the player has a gnomeball on them and then telling the player: "Well you will need to leave them on the surface. They are so full of air that they will stop you diving properly."

combat_stats.1 December2016(Update): The heavy ballista's ranged attack bonus was changed from 110 to 125 and it was given 15 ranged strength bonus. It was also given the requirements of 75Rangedand completion ofMonkey Madness IIto wield.
combat_stats.3 November2016(Update): The ranged attack bonus was changed from 100 to 110.
combat_stats.31 October2016: The ranged attack bonus was changed from 120 to 100 and ranged strength of javelins reduced as it was deemed too powerful withVoid Knight equipment. The delay between the projectile hitting the player and the damage hitsplat appearing has been removed. Previously, there was a delay that allowed a ballista hit and other weapon special attacks to stack in quick succession.

name: Herring
examine: Some nicely cooked herring.

wiki.examine: Some nicely cooked herring.
sources: One of Old School RuneScape ' s Monty Python references is revealed if players use a herring (cooked or raw) with almost any tree in Gielinor . The chatbox will state This is not the mightiest tree in the forest , in reference to one of the lines in Monty Python and the Holy Grail . If used with a redwood tree that has fully grown in the Farming Guild , the chatbox will state This is not the mightiest tree in the forest; it is fairly mighty though. If used with the Grand Tree , the chatbox will state It can't be done! in reference to another line in the movie. If used with the blisterwood tree , the chatbox will state This is indeed a mighty tree. But alas, it is not the mightiest tree in the forest. The Christmas Tree has no herring messages. During the 2020 Christmas event , the message was indeterminable. The chatbox may state: I can't reach that! or have no message at all where the player may step towards the tree and step back again. During the 2021 Christmas event , the chatbox states: Nothing interesting happens. Several other ungatherable trees do not have any herring messages: Evergreen tree from the 2021 Halloween event Mac's evergreen Strong Yew Tree (Draynor guard) Tree (tropical) Spirit tree (Includes fully grown spirit trees)
If used with a redwood tree that has fully grown in the Farming Guild , the chatbox will state This is not the mightiest tree in the forest; it is fairly mighty though.
If used with the Grand Tree , the chatbox will state It can't be done! in reference to another line in the movie.
If used with the blisterwood tree , the chatbox will state This is indeed a mighty tree. But alas, it is not the mightiest tree in the forest.

The Christmas Tree has no herring messages. During the 2020 Christmas event , the message was indeterminable. The chatbox may state: I can't reach that! or have no message at all where the player may step towards the tree and step back again. During the 2021 Christmas event , the chatbox states: Nothing interesting happens.
During the 2020 Christmas event , the message was indeterminable. The chatbox may state: I can't reach that! or have no message at all where the player may step towards the tree and step back again.
During the 2021 Christmas event , the chatbox states: Nothing interesting happens.

Several other ungatherable trees do not have any herring messages: Evergreen tree from the 2021 Halloween event Mac's evergreen Strong Yew Tree (Draynor guard) Tree (tropical) Spirit tree (Includes fully grown spirit trees)

sources: According to the book Gielinor's flora - bushes , jangerberries are native to Feldip Hills , and taste sour and bitter when eaten.

When introduced, the item set a record for the longest single-word item name at 13 characters. The record remains unbeaten, though has since been tied by Nitroglycerin , Pyrophosphite , Ectoplasmator , and the unobtainable interface item Miscellanians .

name: Jar of darkness
examine: It smells like it's been where the sun doesn't shine.

wiki.examine: It smells like it's been where the sun doesn't shine.
sources: Players can right click the View option on the jar to have the game screen go black for a brief moment, with the chatbox stating You view the darkness .
The examine text is a reference to the expression " where the sun don't shine ".

The drop rate of the jar of darkness was originally exceptionally low (at a rate of 1/2,500) relative to the time required to obtain dark totems , taking upwards of thousands of hours on average to obtain one. This was considered to be an oversight, and the drop rate was polled to be increased to 1/500, but failed by 3% of the required votes; this was later polled again to be increased to 1/200, and passed with 85.2% support.

name: Jar of chemicals
examine: Looks unstable.

wiki.examine: Looks unstable.
sources: Using a jar of chemicals on another player gives the message [Player name] does not want to drink something with that many chemicals in it! .

name: Jar of decay
examine: Very healthy.

wiki.examine: Very healthy.
sources: Using most types of bones on the jar will result in the jar consuming them, with the chatbox message stating " The [type of bones] decay into nothingness. ".

name: Jar of dirt
examine: It's just a jar of dirt.

wiki.examine: It's just a jar of dirt.
sources: The jar of dirt is a reference to Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Man's Chest , in which the film's protagonist, Jack Sparrow , receives a jar of dirt that later becomes important to the plot of the film; the owner of the contents of the jar has a 'pet' kraken giving a nod to the monster that drops this item. [ 1 ]

Using a jar of dirt on a jar of sand will cause a bucket of sand -related sound effect to play and the contents of each jar to swap to the other. This is an easter egg initially hinted at by Mod John C on release, but later confirmed by Mod Ash on twitter 5 years later. [ 2 ]

This was the first boss jar released and it was supposed to be untradeable upon release in 2014, however, it was left tradeable accidentally. All subsequent jars until the release of Araxxor and the jar of venom were made tradeable due to this.

wiki.examine: With this jar, your dreams can come true!
sources: When players have the jar in their inventory while casting the Dream spell from the lunar spellbook , the screen will slowly turn black, and The Nightmare's face will show up, together with the sound of the Armadyl crossbow 's special attack.

name: Katana
examine: Created by Hattori Hanzo in the Eastern Lands.

wiki.examine: Created by Hattori Hanzo in the Eastern Lands.
sources: Its examine text refers to Hattori Hanzō , a famous samurai and ninja of the Sengoku era in Japan. The text itself may be a reference to Kill Bill , in which his descendant who shares his name is a swordsmith.
Ak-Haranu can be found wielding a katana in Port Phasmatys , as well as Lorelai in the Warriors' Guild basement.
If you kill the Sourhog from A Porcine of Interest with a katana, your character will say "Nothing personal, pig." after killing it. This is a reference to a copypasta .

name: Kebab
examine: A meaty kebab.

wiki.examine: A meaty kebab.
sources: It is implied that the kebabs are made from camel meat. Ali the Camel Man in Pollnivneach reveals about his discount camel store that "They're not just a source of kebab meat you know!" When using the "Talk-to Camel", the player character can quote "Mmm... looks like that camel would make a nice kebab."
Ali the Camel Man in Pollnivneach reveals about his discount camel store that "They're not just a source of kebab meat you know!"
When using the "Talk-to Camel", the player character can quote "Mmm... looks like that camel would make a nice kebab."
Eating kebabs is the only method of temporarily boosting one's Attack level in a free-to-play server (albeit very rarely).
Kebabs originally had a chance of dealing damage to the player's hitpoints as an adverse effect; however, this feature was removed to prevent players from being killed inadvertently.

Kebabs in Old School RuneScape are specifically based on the real-life doner kebab , originating from Turkey, sometimes stuffed into pitta bread as with the player-made ugthanki kebab , and a popular street food in the United Kingdom, where the Jagex office is based.

When the player attempts to drink a keg of beer whilst on the Fishing Trawler , they will receive a message saying "With my sea sickness? You must be joking!" However, they can drink the keg perfectly fine on their own boat .

sources: Before RuneScape first launched in 2001, the knife was originally intended to be wieldable as a weapon. Although the option to wield it was removed before launch, its code with weapon stats still remained. For a brief time there was a bug where players could wield the knife, and also wield multiple knives at once, stacking their stats and giving them an insane strength bonus. This glitch has since been patched. (See knife bug )

name: Lightbearer
examine: A heavy ring that glimmers with a strange power.

wiki.examine: A heavy ring that glimmers with a strange power.
sources: the amount of downtime – when not attacking anything where a damage bonus would be useful, special attack can regenerate faster without sacrifice
the effectiveness of the special attack versus main weapon – if the special attack is only slightly more powerful or useful in comparison, sacrificing damage for more specials is not worthwhile
the main weapon itself – some weapons benefit from strength upgrades more than others due to their damage calculation, notably the scythe of Vitur and emberlight

combat style(s) used – with melee, the ultor ring (or its downgrades) provides a substantial boost to overall damage, making Lightbearer less useful in comparison; conversely with ranged, the venator ring provides only a minor boost; and with magic, there are few especially powerful special attacks
Concept art of the Lightbearer by Mod Jerv .

Cooked chicken (undead) and cooked meat (undead) cannot be used to make a meat pizza. Attempting to do so results in Nothing interesting happens.

wiki.examine: Official explorer headgear!
sources: The Natural Historians of the Varrock Museum appear to wear this item, including Historian Minas and David ; Charles and John (at Fossil Island ); and Historian Duffy , the Mountain Guide , and the Natural Historian (at Mount Quidamortem ).

Unlike the other natural historians, Orlando Smith instead wears a fedora reminiscent of Indiana Jones (shared with Asgarnia Smith and the crazy archaeologist ). Anna Jones , whose name is also an Indiana Jones reference, nonetheless does wear the pith helmet (despite having quit from the Varrock museum).

sources: For a brief period of five days, ranger gloves saw a sharp increase in price and trade volume as a result of the gloves being planned to be used as a component in creating vampyrium vambraces , a potential reward from the Theatre of Blood . The vampyrium vambraces failed its poll with 74.9% votes yes, 0.1% short of the 75% supermajority required for the item to enter the game. During this period between 7 March 2018 and 12 March 2018 , units of ranger gloves were sold for as much as 19 million coins , ten times the gloves' normal price. Trade volume for the gloves was as high as 2,179 units during this period, more than 8 times the gloves' normal volume. As a result of player feedback, ranger gloves were removed as a requirement for creating the vambraces, and the vambraces were polled to be dropped as a standalone item. [ 1 ]

During this period between 7 March 2018 and 12 March 2018 , units of ranger gloves were sold for as much as 19 million coins , ten times the gloves' normal price. Trade volume for the gloves was as high as 2,179 units during this period, more than 8 times the gloves' normal volume. As a result of player feedback, ranger gloves were removed as a requirement for creating the vambraces, and the vambraces were polled to be dropped as a standalone item. [ 1 ]

Contrary to popular belief, the tan parts of the ranger gloves are not actually part of the gloves themselves, but rather a depiction of tan-shaded hands wearing the fingerless gloves. This makes ranger gloves the only hands slot item in the game whose sprite is displayed as such.

As a result, the colour of the lower half of the gloves changes according to the player's default skin tone, and thus can be changed by selecting a different skin tone at the Makeover Mage south-west of Falador . The variants are shown below:

name: Raw herring
examine: I should try cooking this.

wiki.examine: I should try cooking this.
sources: One of Old School RuneScape ' s Monty Python references is revealed if players use a herring (cooked or raw) with almost any tree in Gielinor . The chatbox will state This is not the mightiest tree in the forest , in reference to one of the lines in Monty Python and the Holy Grail . If used with a redwood tree that has fully grown in the Farming Guild , the chatbox will state This is not the mightiest tree in the forest; it is fairly mighty though. If used with the Grand Tree , the chatbox will state It can't be done! in reference to another line in the movie. If used with the blisterwood tree , the chatbox will state This is indeed a mighty tree. But alas, it is not the mightiest tree in the forest. The Christmas Tree has no herring messages. During the 2020 Christmas event , the message was indeterminable. The chatbox may state: I can't reach that! or have no message at all where the player may step towards the tree and step back again. During the 2021 Christmas event , the chatbox states: Nothing interesting happens. Several other ungatherable trees do not have any herring messages: Evergreen tree from the 2021 Halloween event Mac's evergreen Strong Yew Tree (Draynor guard) Tree (tropical)

sources: According to the book Gielinor's flora - flowers , "The name rosemary derives from old Saradominist texts where it is known as Rosmarinus. This roughly translates to sea-dew, likely due to the fact that rosemary thrives by the sea."
In real life, rosemary is planted by some gardeners as a natural way to protect against a common cabbage pest, the cabbage looper .

name: Rope
examine: A coil of rope.

wiki.examine: A coil of rope.
sources: Neitiznot supplies rope made from yak hair to all of the rope traders in Gielinor .

Ned leads you to believe that he makes rope from wool . During The Fremennik Isles quest, however, you discover that Ned trades with the Fremennik in Neitiznot , exchanging the wool he receives for rope. The Fremennik are amused that you would believe sturdy rope could be made from something as flimsy as wool rather than tough yak hair . After The Fremennik Isles quest, if you buy a rope from Ned, your character will notice that it smells strange, and if you continue through the dialogue, Ned will give you a second rope for free, as a payment for your silence.

After The Fremennik Isles quest, if you buy a rope from Ned, your character will notice that it smells strange, and if you continue through the dialogue, Ned will give you a second rope for free, as a payment for your silence.

name: Seaweed spore
examine: A seaweed spore - plant in a seaweed patch.

wiki.examine: A seaweed spore - plant in a seaweed patch.
sources: They may randomly appear when diving in shallow water within the underwater area beneath Fossil Island . 1-3 seaweed spores can spawn, and they will despawn in 30 seconds. Like marks of grace , they appear individually for each player. However, unlike marks of grace, they will instantly disappear upon logging out. Also unlike marks of grace, more than one spawn of seaweed spores can appear at a time. When they spawn, they release a cloud of bubbles, and all players whose spores spawn on that tick will spawn at the same tile. A timer runs while the player is in an eligible part of the underwater area, which provides an opportunity for a seaweed spore to spawn at frequent intervals. [ 1 ] The interval has been observed to be as low as a single tick . There is a 1% chance a spore will be spawned whenever the timer ticks down. [ 2 ] How quickly a player picks up seaweed spores after they have spawned does not influence when the next spawn opportunity is granted. [ 3 ]

A timer runs while the player is in an eligible part of the underwater area, which provides an opportunity for a seaweed spore to spawn at frequent intervals. [ 1 ] The interval has been observed to be as low as a single tick . There is a 1% chance a spore will be spawned whenever the timer ticks down. [ 2 ] How quickly a player picks up seaweed spores after they have spawned does not influence when the next spawn opportunity is granted. [ 3 ]
They can be obtained as a drop from ammonite crabs , lobstrosities and Fossil Island Wyverns .
They can be purchased from Mairin's Market in exchange for 20 mermaid's tears per spore.
They can be pickpocketed from Master Farmers .
They can be received from the Managing Miscellania activity by commanding subjects to work on the farm.

wiki.examine: The left half of a dragon square shield.
sources: During the RuneScape 2 beta, the shield left half was erroneously sold in the Legends' Guild instead of the right half. This was fixed in an update on 15 March 2004 .

Although the shield halves become a square shield when joined, the right and left halves themselves appear to be two parts of a kiteshield. This has remained unchanged, even after the addition of an actual dragon kiteshield in 2018 .

combat_stats.21 January2026(Update): The un-attuned item's examine was changed from "A power enhancing sigil not yet attuned to you." to "Your melee accuracy is increased by +30 in stab, slash and crush. name: Sinister key
examine: You get a sense of dread from this key.

wiki.examine: You get a sense of dread from this key (Used to open the sinister chest in Yanille dungeon).
sources: If you were to clean and make all the herbs received into potions, each sinister key would give between 747 and 1345 Herblore experience, depending on which potions you decide to make.

Sinister keys are a common method for early game ironmen to get torstols , which can be given to the Dr Jekyll random event in exchange for stamina potions —allowing them to build a rejuvenation pool in their player-owned house without having level 77 Herblore .
Using sinister keys from Salarin the twisted was the only way to obtain torstols in RuneScape Classic , since Farming did not exist, and the only potion they were used in is Zamorak brew .

name: Snape grass
examine: Strange spiky grass.

wiki.examine: Strange spiky grass.
sources: Snape grass appears to be based on some kind of psammophilic (sand-loving) beach grass, such as Leymus arenarius or Ammophila , as snape grass is a spiky grass only found in the wild near coastlines.

According to the book Gielinor's flora - allotments , "Snape grass has a subtle fruity flavour and is often used in teas. When crushed, the leaves emit a fruit smell which can be used to repel some insects, but interestingly has been known to attract bees." In addition, the leaves change colour from green to red during changing autumn temperatures, but this does not occur in-game.

name: Superior dragon bones
examine: There's something unnatural about these bones.

wiki.examine: There's something unnatural about these bones.
sources: Superior dragon bones are the only type of bones that require a Prayer level to be used.

Upon release, adamant and rune dragons had a 1/5 and 1/3 chance, respectively, of their dragon bones drop being replaced by superior dragon bones. This was removed from their drop table in an update on 25 January 2018 as part of a balancing change.

Prior to the release of the Sailing skill, these bones could only be obtained via killing Vorkath after completion of Dragon Slayer II . As of Sailing's release, the frost dragons on Grimstone also drop the bones, though they are not a guaranteed drop. Dragon Slayer II is still required to create super antifire potions and extended super antifires .

name: Tinderbox
examine: Useful for lighting a fire.

wiki.examine: Useful for lighting a fire.
sources: Top floor of Draynor Manor near Professor Oddenstein 's machine
In the small shed immediately south of the Farming Guild
On the wrecked ship on the north of Harmony Island

Searching certain shelves of the Wise Old Man 's home gives a tinderbox, possibly book(s) and a message questioning why he keeps so many tinderboxes. This is likely due to Dionysus's eventual assault upon the Wizards' Tower . Though it is possible to quickly obtain multiple tinderboxes from it, your character will only take one at a time, and only if your inventory has none; this can be easily bypassed through the drop trick .
From the axe crate at the Wintertodt. The same drop trick described above can be used here.

Upstairs of Gnocci the Cook 's house in Corsair Cove has an infinite spawn of tinderboxes. You can only have 5 tinderboxes in your inventory before being told you already have plenty, although drop tricking bypasses this.

name: Trouver parchment
examine: Take it to Perdu to help you avoid losing certain items.

wiki.examine: Take it to Perdu to help you avoid losing certain items.
sources: The Trouver system has been reworked. Untradeables with no Combat benefits should never be lost on death, Untradeables with some Combat bonuses should break and need repairing without a Trouver parchment, Untradeables with strong Combat bonuses should need to be 'Trouvered' once, then never again.
Untradeables with no Combat benefits should never be lost on death,
Untradeables with some Combat bonuses should break and need repairing without a Trouver parchment,
Untradeables with strong Combat bonuses should need to be 'Trouvered' once, then never again.

name: Tuna
examine: Wow, this is a big fish.

wiki.examine: Wow, this is a big fish.
sources: Until 24 December 2001 , the examine text of tuna was simply "Wow". [ 1 ] This was unintentional, arising from the fact that values in the game data were separated by commas at the time, making it impossible to include a comma in an examine text.

name: Tuna potato
examine: A baked potato with tuna and sweetcorn.

wiki.examine: A baked potato with tuna and sweetcorn.
sources: Eating a tuna potato results in less healing than eating its ingredients separately. At level 99 Hitpoints, eating a potato with butter (14 hitpoints), tuna (10 hitpoints), and cooked sweetcorn (10 hitpoints) heals a total of 34 hitpoints. Eating a potato with butter and a bowl of tuna and corn (13 hitpoints) heals a total of 27 hitpoints.
At level 99 Hitpoints, eating a potato with butter (14 hitpoints), tuna (10 hitpoints), and cooked sweetcorn (10 hitpoints) heals a total of 34 hitpoints.

name: Uncut dragonstone
examine: This would be worth more cut.

wiki.examine: This would be worth more cut.
sources: In the Tower of Life quest, the player has to answer a question to the Homunculus about how dragons can breathe fire . One of the answers suggests that this is done with the power of 'magical dragonstones'. The other answer states that it happens through the ignition of gas when the dragon exhales. It is possible that the ignition of dragonfire is mediated through some magical property of dragonstone crystals.

name: White berries
examine: Sour berries, used in potions.

wiki.examine: Sour berries, used in potions.
sources: According to the book Gielinor's flora - bushes , white berries are native to the forests of Isafdar and prefer to act as a parasite on trees. In addition, they have a cultural significance around Wintumber where they are used as a decoration under which lovers are expected to kiss. The fact that white berries are parasitic and used as a decoration under which lovers are expected to kiss is in reference to real-life mistletoe , which shares these traits.

name: White lily

wiki.examine: A fully bloomed White lily.
sources: According to the book Gielinor's flora - flowers , white lilies are sweet-smelling, symbolising chastity and virtue. As such, it has become a symbol among followers of Saradomin , with some even believing that Saradomin himself created the lily to improve the crops of his most cherished followers. The book also describes how white lilies are fatal if ingested by cats. While this is true in real life, it has no bearing on gameplay, as they cannot be fed to cats.

combat_stats.7 July2021(Update): The weapon's position on female players has been adjusted so that they appear to be equipped properly.
combat_stats.14 July2016(Update): The item's inventory sprite was reverted to the original version.
combat_stats.6 July2016(Update): The item's inventory sprite was slightly adjusted with the release of ornamental godswords.
combat_stats.12 November2015(Update|poll): The special attack cost has been reduced to 50%, down from 60%.
combat_stats.19 March2015(Update|poll): The accurate attack style of the Godswords has been adjusted to use slash rather than crush. As the slash attack bonus on Godswords has always been higher than the crush bonus, having the accurate attack style of the weapons use slash rather than crush means that the accurate attack style takes advantage of the best offensive bonus of the weapon.
combat_stats.7 November2013(Update|poll): The Accurate combat mode of godswords has been changed from 'Stab' to 'Crush', since godswords have no stab-attack bonusGodswords will now pop up a confirmation box when you try to dismantle them
